final_source:
/*
DATAFLOW:
┌──────────┐    POST /api/broadcast    ┌──────────┐    save    ┌────────┐
│ Client   │ ──────────────────────→ │ Backend  │ ────────→ │Messages│
│(Web Form)│ ←──────────────────────── │ (server) │ ←──────── │  DB    │
└──────────┘    WebSocket updates      └──────────┘   query  └────────┘
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Messages table:
  message, required
  created_at, auto_date

when user sends data to /api/broadcast:
  requires login
  saved = save data to Messages
  send back saved with status 201

when user subscribes to updates:
  all_messages = get all Messages
  send back all_messages
